info.title: Shift Hours
info.description: Manage shift hours configuration for Zoho CRM business hours, including shift timing, break schedules, user assignments, and holiday definitions.

get.description: Retrieves all configured shift hours including shift timing, break hours, users, and holidays for each shift.

200.description: Successfully retrieved all shift hours with their configurations

shift_count.description: Count of shifts with user assignments

total_shift_with_user.description: Total number of shifts that have users assigned

custom_timing.description: Different shift timings for different days (null when same_as_everyday is true)

shift_timing.description: Start and end time for the shift

users_count.description: Number of users assigned to this shift

holidays.description: List of holidays for this shift

daily_timing.description: Default timing for all days (null when same_as_everyday is false)

break_hours.description: List of break periods for this shift

custom_timing.description: Different break timings for different days (null when same_as_everyday is true)

break_timing.description: Start and end time for the break

daily_timing.description: Default break timing for all days (null when same_as_everyday is false)

same_as_everyday.description: Indicates if break has same timing every day

id.description: Unique identifier for the break hour

shift_days.description: Days when this shift is active

same_as_everyday.description: Indicates if shift has same timing every day

id.description: Unique identifier for the shift hour

users.description: List of users assigned to this shift (null when no users assigned)

zuid.description: Zoho unique identifier for the user

effective_from.description: Date from which the user is assigned to this shift

post.description: Creates one or more new shift hour configurations with timing, break hours, and timezone settings.

shift_hours.description: List of shift hours to create

break_hours.description: List of break hours for the shift

daily_timing.description: Default break timing for all days

custom_timing.description: Different break timings for different days

break_timing.description: Start and end time for the break

same_as_everyday.description: Indicates if break has same timing every day

shift_days.description: Days when this shift is active

custom_timing.description: Different shift timings for different days

shift_timing.description: Start and end time for the shift

same_as_everyday.description: Indicates if shift has same timing every day

holidays.description: List of holidays for this shift

users.description: List of users assigned to this shift

400.description: Bad request due to invalid data, missing mandatory fields, duplicate data, or dependency violations

limit_due_to.description: Fields that caused the limit to be exceeded

enum: Daily timing required for "Same hours everyday" mode
Custom timing required for "Different hours everyday" mode
Shift hours Not within BusinessHours time
Shift hours Not within BusinessHours time
Break Hours timing is over lapped
Date Should be between current and next financial year
Effective from should be greater than current date
Effective from should be less than 6 months
The timing of the break hours fall outside the shift
break timing should be greater than 15 minutes and less than 2 hours
Shift Name should not contain special characters:%, ^, &
Holiday Name should not contain special characters:#, %, ^, &

put.description: Updates one or more existing shift hour configurations with new timing, break hours, or timezone settings.

shift_hours.description: List of shift hours to update

break_hours.description: List of break hours for the shift

daily_timing.description: Default break timing for all days when same_as_everyday is true

custom_timing.description: Different break timings for different days

break_timing.description: Start and end time for the break

same_as_everyday.description: Indicates if break has same timing every day

shift_days.description: Days when this shift is active

custom_timing.description: Different shift timings for different days

shift_timing.description: Start and end time for the shift

same_as_everyday.description: Indicates if shift has same timing every day

holidays.description: List of holidays for this shift

users.description: List of users assigned to this shift

400.description: Bad request due to invalid data, missing mandatory fields, duplicate data, or dependency violations

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific shift hour configuration including timing, breaks, users, and holidays.

200.description: Successfully retrieved the specific shift hour configuration

put.description: Updates a specific shift hour configuration with new timing, break hours, or timezone settings.

shift_hours.description: List of shift hours to update

break_hours.description: List of break hours for the shift

daily_timing.description: Default break timing for all days

custom_timing.description: Different break timings for different days

break_timing.description: Start and end time for the break

same_as_everyday.description: Indicates if break has same timing every day

shift_days.description: Days when this shift is active

custom_timing.description: Different shift timings for different days

shift_timing.description: Start and end time for the shift

same_as_everyday.description: Indicates if shift has same timing every day

holidays.description: List of holidays for this shift

users.description: List of users assigned to this shift

400.description: Bad request due to invalid data, missing mandatory fields, duplicate data, or dependency violations

delete.description: Deletes a specific shift hour configuration. This operation cannot be undone.

400.description: Bad request due to invalid shift ID

Shift.name: shift
Shift.description: Unique identifier of the shift hour

ForbiddenResponse.description: Forbidden due to insufficient permissions to manage shift hours

NoContentResponse.description: No shift hours configured or shift hour not found

scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.business_hours.ALL: Full access to manage business hours and shift hours settings
scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.business_hours.CREATE: Create access to manage business hours and shift hours settings
scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.business_hours.READ: Get access to manage business hours and shift hours settings
scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.business_hours.UPDATE: Update access to manage business hours and shift hours settings
scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.business_hours.DELETE: Delete access to manage business hours and shift hours settings
